briefdescription.para: Flush RX FIFO in RX buffer.
Data received in RXD (but potentially not yet transferred to Data RAM).
Shortcut between ENDRX event and STARTRX task.
Shortcut between ENDRX event and STOPRX task.
Shortcut between ENDTX event and STOPTX task.
Shortcut between ENDTX event and STOPTX task.
Types of UARTE flow control modes.
Types of UARTE stop bit modes.
Data is trimmed from MSB end.
Data is trimmed from LSB end.
Types of UARTE Frame trimming endianness when frame size is less than 8.
Function for clearing a specific UARTE event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the UARTE event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the address of the specified UARTE event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified event.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be set.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be checked.

simplesect.para: Mask of requested shortcuts which were enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be enabled.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be disabled.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_uarte_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_uarte_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_uarte_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given UARTE task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given UARTE task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given UARTE task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the publish configuration for a given UARTE event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the publish configuration for a given UARTE event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given UARTE event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting error source mask. Function is clearing error source flags after reading.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting error source mask.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing error source flags after reading.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask with error sources to be cleared.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the UARTE is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The UARTE is enabled.
The UARTE is not enabled.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
TXD pin number.
RXD pin number.

CTS pin number.

briefdescription.para: Function for disconnecting flow control pins.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for starting an UARTE task.

Task.

briefdescription.para: Function for returning the address of the specified task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to UARTE settings structure.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting UARTE baud rate.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Baud rate.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the transmit buffer length.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Maximum number of data bytes to receive.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the transmit buffer pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the buffer for received data.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the transmit buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the buffer with data to send.
Maximum number of data bytes to transmit.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the transmit buffer address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting number of bytes transmitted in the last transaction.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
of bytes transmitted.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the receive buffer length.

Pointer to the buffer for received data.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the receive buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the buffer for received data.
Maximum number of data bytes to receive.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the reception buffer address.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting number of bytes received in the last transaction.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
of bytes received.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Frame timeout in bits.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Address.

value.

briefdescription.para: Macro getting pointer to the structure of registers of the UARTE peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: UARTE instance index.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the UARTE peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether dedicated DMA register is present.
Symbol indicating whether UARTE DMA tasks and events are present.
Symbol indicating whether UARTE DMA shortcuts are present.
Symbol indicating whether UARTE ENDTX_STOPTX shortcut is present.
Symbol indicating whether UARTE FRAMETIMEOUT event is present.
Symbol indicating whether UARTE parity types are present.
Symbol indicating whether UARTE STOP modes are present.
Symbol indicating whether UARTE supports variable frame size.
Base frequency value 320 MHz for UARTE.
Base frequency value 128 MHz for UARTE.
Base frequency value 64 MHz for UARTE.
Base frequency value 16 MHz for UARTE.
Macro for checking whether the base frequency for the specified UARTE is 320 MHz.
Macro for checking whether the base frequency for the specified UARTE is 128 MHz.
Macro for checking whether the base frequency for the specified UARTE is 64 MHz.
Macro for getting base frequency value in Hz for the specified UARTE.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Hardware access layer for managing the UARTE peripheral.
